description: Conservative preservation/review pack for Devart data-access components. Nonvisual data access components may be preserved only when the target owns compatible Devart packages and platform support; UI dialogs and provider-specific behavior require review.

rules.notes: UniDAC connection is nonvisual and may be usable in FMX with compatible Devart packages.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify provider packages, connection options, deployment libraries, and target-platform support.

rules.notes: UniDAC query is nonvisual and may be preserved with compatible Devart packages.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify SQL, parameters, update behavior, and connection references.

rules.notes: UniDAC table component is nonvisual and may be preserved with compatible Devart packages.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify table names, indexes, update behavior, and target-platform support.

rules.notes: UniDAC stored procedure component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify parameter metadata and provider behavior.

rules.notes: UniDAC SQL execution component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify SQL statements and provider-specific options.

rules.notes: UniDAC script component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review script execution, delimiters, error handling, and deployment.

rules.notes: UniDAC transaction component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review transaction scope and connection references.

rules.notes: Update SQL helper is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review generated/handwritten update SQL and dataset references.
DataSource preservation depends on FMX LiveBindings/data-aware strategy and component package support.

rules.notes: Metadata component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review provider support and runtime usage.

rules.notes: Bulk loader is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review platform-specific provider libraries and bulk-load behavior.

rules.notes: Dump/restore component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review file paths, platform storage, and provider support.
Monitoring/logging integration may be platform/package-specific.
Connection dialog UI is VCL-specific and should be rebuilt or replaced for FMX.

rules.notes: Database event alerter may be preserved with compatible packages.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify provider event support and platform behavior.
In-memory dataset may be preserved with Devart packages, but fields, indexes, persistence, and FMX binding should be reviewed.
Custom virtual dataset callbacks and binding behavior require review.
Virtual query behavior and in-memory source datasets require review.

rules.notes: Provider component can usually be preserved with compatible Devart packages.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify deployment libraries and target-platform support.

rules.notes: Provider component can usually be preserved with compatible Devart packages.
rules.manual_review_reason: Verify deployment libraries and target-platform support.

rules.manual_review_reason: Verify deployment libraries and target-platform support.

rules.manual_review_reason: Verify deployment libraries and target-platform support.

rules.manual_review_reason: Verify deployment libraries and target-platform support.

rules.manual_review_reason: Verify deployment libraries and target-platform support.
